title: Candy Paradise Lollipop Rainbow Twister Lollies 50g Kids Party Bags Sweets. Halal Vegan. Cake Toppers & Party Favours Great Value. Assorted Colours (1)
features: Mesmerizing Twister Design: Eye-catching spiral shape with vibrant rainbow colors, perfect for adding fun and excitement to any candy collection.
Delicious Flavor Variety: A symphony of tangy citrus and sweet berry flavors expertly crafted in each swirl for an irresistible taste experience.
Perfectly Sized at 50g: The ideal portion for satisfying sweet cravings, whether at home, on a road trip, or at a party.
Shareable and Fun: Great for enjoying on your own or sharing with friends and family, adding a playful touch to any moment.
Ideal for Gifting: A delightful treat that’s perfect for birthdays, party favors, or as a cheerful gift for candy lovers of all ages.
description: Product description The Candy Paradise Rainbow Twister Lollipop 50g is a delightful blend of vibrant colors and irresistible flavors, crafted in a mesmerizing spiral design that’s as fun to look at as it is to eat. This eye-catching lollipop features a symphony of flavors, from tangy citrus to sweet berry, making every lick a new and exciting taste adventure. Perfectly sized at 50g, it’s the ideal portion for satisfying sweet cravings wherever you go—whether you’re at a party, on a road trip, or relaxing at home. Great for sharing or enjoying on your own, this playful and delicious treat is perfect for adding a pop of fun to your day. It also makes a thoughtful gift or party favor, bringing smiles to candy lovers of all ages. Ingredients Ingredients: Sugar, Glucose syrup, Water, Acidity Regulator: Citric Acid, Colours Directions Open the packaging carefully. Suitable for ages 3 and up.
